createtensura.race.construct.description: A Machine out of Metal and Magicules, born to §6Create§r, forced to gather materials.
createtensura.skill.mechanical_eye.descr: A Skill allowing you to view the ins and outs of Machinery!
createtensura.skill.mechanical_hand.desc: Configure your Hand into different wrench Modes!
createtensura.race.robot.description: Fully Iron, Fully Sentient and Fully capable of major Destruction.
createtensura.race.gundam.description: The Largest beings known to the world, if they cant fit through a door, they'll replace it with a gate.
createtensura.race.warframe.description: A Mechanical being, made with the sole intention of destruction.
